problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
